**4. Diagrams:**

*   **Figure 1: Schematic of the "swirl-counter-swirl" configuration**
    *   Components: Air flow meter, Air, CO, H2, fuel bar, choke plate, swirler, radial microjets, quartz tube, flame anchored by swirl and sudden expansion, emissions tap, exhaust, pressure sensors.
    *   Dimensions: 11 cm, 50 cm, 54 cm, 123 cm, 440 cm.
*   **Figure 2: Schematic of the "swirl-counter-swirl" configuration, showing normal, counter-rotating microjets inducing swirl counter to the main air swirler.**
    *   Components: Main Swirl Orientation, Microjet Swirl Orientation, Inlet, Exhaust, Swirler Blades, Microjets, Section View, Combustion Chamber.

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   Combustor inlet pipe diameter: 38 mm
*   Combustor sudden expansion diameter: 76 mm
*   Choke position: 54 cm upstream of the step
*   Axial swirler vanes: 8
*   Swirler position: 10 cm upstream of the step
*   Swirl number: 0.6
*   Combustor and Exhaust Length: 440 cm
*   Main air supply: 110 g/s at 883 kPa
*   Microjet angle: 35 degrees

title: AIAA-197100-110
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 3]
Here's the extracted technical content:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

*   **Figure 4: Overall sound pressure level as a function of the fully mixed equivalence ratio for the SCS configuration.**
    *   Axes:
        *   x-axis: Fully Mixed Equivalence Ratio, φm
        *   y-axis: Overall Sound Pressure Level, dB
    *   Curves:
        *   No microjet air
        *   1.2 g/s microjet air
        *   1.6 g/s microjet air
        *   2.0 g/s microjet air
    *   Key Values:
        * Vertical lines at φm ~ 0.6 (labeled 40 Hz) and φm ~ 0.65 (labeled 110 Hz)
        * Stable region is indicated to the right of φm ~0.65

**3. Tables:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

*   **Figure 3. Schematic of the stereo PIV setup.**
    *   Components and Labels:
        *   Exhaust
        *   Optically Accessible Combustion Chamber
        *   Double Pulse Laser (PIV)
        *   CMOS Cameras in Stereo Config. (PIV)
        *   Sheet Optics
        *   Inlet

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   Pressure data recording rate: 10 kHz
*   PIV laser: 50 W Nd:YLF
*   PIV image capture rate: 2 kHz
*   PIV field of view: 76 mm x 76 mm
*   Seeding particle diameter: 0.9 to 2.2 µm
*   Test duration: 0.55 s
*   Images recorded per test: 2200
*   Velocity fields created per test: 1100
*   Bins for unstable cases: 80
*   Velocity fields per bin (unstable): 25 to 40
*   Reynolds number: 19000
*   Mass flow rate: 8.9 to 9.7 g/s
*   Inlet velocity: 7.1 to 7.5 m/s
*   Microjet flow rate: 1.0 to 4.0 g/s
*   Inlet equivalence ratio: 0.85
*   Microjet flow rates for SCS testing: 1.2 g/s, 1.6 g/s, 2.0 g/s
